DQN_LN_RT.title: DQN_LN_RT
DQN_LN_RT.description: DQN with LayerNorm and Reward Trace.
DQN_LN_RT.mermaid_source:
graph TD
                        classDef styleInput fill:#fbcfe8,stroke:#f472b6,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleNorm fill:#fef9c3,stroke:#facc15,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleMlp fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#38bdf8,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleRnn fill:#ffedd5,stroke:#fb923c,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleHead fill:#fae8ff,stroke:#e879f9,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleConcat fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#64748b,stroke-dasharray: 4 4,color:#0f172a
                        Obs("Observation\n9×9×3"):::styleInput
                        Scalars("Last Action + Last Reward\n[4]"):::styleInput
                        Conv("Conv2D 16×3×3\n9×9×3→9×9×16\n448 params"):::styleMlp
                        ReLU1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
                        Flat("Flatten\n→1296"):::styleMlp
                        Concat("Concat\n→1300"):::styleConcat
                        QHead("Q-Head\n64→4\n260 params"):::styleHead
                        subgraph ForagerNet ["ForagerNet (Representation)"]
                        direction TB
                        Dense1("Dense\n1300→64\n83,264 params"):::styleMlp
                        LN1("LayerNorm\n64\n32 params"):::styleNorm
                        Act1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
                        Dense2("Dense\n64→64\n4,160 params"):::styleMlp
                        LN2("LayerNorm\n64\n128 params"):::styleNorm
                        Act2("ReLU"):::styleNorm
                        Dense1 --> LN1
                        LN1 --> Act1
                        Act1 --> Dense2
                        Dense2 --> LN2
                        LN2 --> Act2
                        end
                        Obs --> Conv
                        Conv --> ReLU1
                        ReLU1 --> Flat
                        Flat --> Concat
                        Scalars --> Concat
                        Concat --> Dense1
                        Act2 --> QHead

                        Dense2("Dense\n64→64\n4,160 params"):::styleMlp

DQN.title: DQN
DQN.mermaid_source:
graph TD
                        classDef styleInput fill:#fbcfe8,stroke:#f472b6,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleNorm fill:#fef9c3,stroke:#facc15,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleMlp fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#38bdf8,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleRnn fill:#ffedd5,stroke:#fb923c,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleHead fill:#fae8ff,stroke:#e879f9,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleConcat fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#64748b,stroke-dasharray: 4 4,color:#0f172a
                        Obs("Observation\n9×9×3"):::styleInput
                        Scalars("Last Action + Last Reward\n[5]"):::styleInput
                        Conv("Conv2D 16×3×3\n9×9×3→9×9×16\n448 params"):::styleMlp
                        ReLU1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
                        Flat("Flatten\n→1296"):::styleMlp
                        Concat("Concat\n→1301"):::styleConcat
                        QHead("Q-Head\n64→4\n260 params"):::styleHead
                        subgraph ForagerNet ["ForagerNet (Representation)"]
                        direction TB
                        Dense1("Dense\n1301→64\n83,328 params"):::styleMlp
                        Act1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
                        Dense2("Dense\n64→64\n4,160 params"):::styleMlp
                        Act2("ReLU"):::styleNorm
                        Dense1 --> Act1
                        Act1 --> Dense2
                        Dense2 --> Act2
                        end
                        Obs --> Conv
                        Conv --> ReLU1
                        ReLU1 --> Flat
                        Flat --> Concat
                        Scalars --> Concat
                        Concat --> Dense1
                        Act2 --> QHead

DRQN_LN_0_2.title: DRQN_LN_0_2
DRQN_LN_0_2.description: Recurrent DQN with LayerNorm, 0 pre-GRU layers.
DRQN_LN_0_2.mermaid_source:
graph TD
                        classDef styleInput fill:#fbcfe8,stroke:#f472b6,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleNorm fill:#fef9c3,stroke:#facc15,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleMlp fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#38bdf8,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleRnn fill:#ffedd5,stroke:#fb923c,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleHead fill:#fae8ff,stroke:#e879f9,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleConcat fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#64748b,stroke-dasharray: 4 4,color:#0f172a
                        Obs("Seq Obs\n9×9×3"):::styleInput
                        Scalars("Seq Scalars\n[5]"):::styleInput
                        Conv("Conv2D 16×3×3\n9×9×3→9×9×16\n448 params"):::styleMlp
                        ReLU1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
                        Flat("Flatten\n→1296"):::styleMlp
                        Concat("Concat\n→1301"):::styleConcat
                        GRU("GRU 64\n1301→64\n262,336 params"):::styleRnn
                        ReLU2("ReLU"):::styleNorm
                        Skip("Concat Skip\n→2602"):::styleConcat
                        QHead("Q-Head\n2602→4\n5,464 params"):::styleHead
                        Obs --> Conv
                        Conv --> ReLU1
                        ReLU1 --> Flat
                        Flat --> Concat
                        Scalars --> Concat
                        Concat --> GRU
                        Concat --> Skip
                        GRU --> ReLU2
                        ReLU2 --> Skip
                        Skip --> QHead

DRQN_LN_1_1.title: DRQN_LN_1_1
DRQN_LN_1_1.description: Recurrent DQN with LayerNorm, 1 pre-GRU layer.
DRQN_LN_1_1.mermaid_source:
graph TD
                        classDef styleInput fill:#fbcfe8,stroke:#f472b6,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleNorm fill:#fef9c3,stroke:#facc15,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleMlp fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#38bdf8,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleRnn fill:#ffedd5,stroke:#fb923c,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleHead fill:#fae8ff,stroke:#e879f9,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleConcat fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#64748b,stroke-dasharray: 4 4,color:#0f172a
                        Obs("Seq Obs\n9×9×3"):::styleInput
                        Scalars("Seq Scalars\n[5]"):::styleInput
                        Conv("Conv2D 16×3×3\n9×9×3→9×9×16\n448 params"):::styleMlp
                        ReLU1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
                        Flat("Flatten\n→1296"):::styleMlp
                        Concat("Concat\n→1301"):::styleConcat
                        GRU("GRU 64\n64→64\n24,832 params"):::styleRnn
                        ReLU2("ReLU"):::styleNorm
                        Skip("Concat Skip\n→128"):::styleConcat
                        QHead("Q-Head\n128→4\n516 params"):::styleHead
                        subgraph PreGRU ["Pre-GRU"]
                        direction TB
                        Pre("Dense\n1301→64\n83,328 params"):::styleMlp
                        PreLN("LayerNorm\n64"):::styleNorm
                        PreAct("ReLU"):::styleNorm
                        Pre --> PreLN
                        PreLN --> PreAct
                        end
                        Obs --> Conv
                        Conv --> ReLU1
                        ReLU1 --> Flat
                        Flat --> Concat
                        Scalars --> Concat
                        Concat --> Pre
                        PreAct --> GRU
                        PreAct --> Skip
                        GRU --> ReLU2
                        ReLU2 --> Skip
                        Skip --> QHead

PPO_LN_RT_128.title: PPO_LN_RT_128
PPO_LN_RT_128.description: PPO with LayerNorm and Reward Trace.

Scalars.label: Last A, Last R, R Trace\n[6]

PPO_LN_RT_128.mermaid_source:
graph TD
                        classDef styleInput fill:#fbcfe8,stroke:#f472b6,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleNorm fill:#fef9c3,stroke:#facc15,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleMlp fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#38bdf8,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleRnn fill:#ffedd5,stroke:#fb923c,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleHead fill:#fae8ff,stroke:#e879f9,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleConcat fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#64748b,stroke-dasharray: 4 4,color:#0f172a
                        Obs("Observation\n9×9×3"):::styleInput
                        Scalars("Last A, Last R, R Trace\n[6]"):::styleInput
                        Flat("Flatten\n→243"):::styleMlp
                        subgraph Actor ["Actor"]
                        direction TB
                        A_Emb("Dense\n243→58\n14,152 params"):::styleMlp
                        A_LN1("LayerNorm\n58\n116 params"):::styleNorm
                        A_Act1("Tanh"):::styleNorm
                        A_Concat("Concat\n→64"):::styleConcat
                        A_Dense2("Dense\n64→192\n12,480 params"):::styleMlp
                        A_Dense3("Dense\n192→64\n12,352 params"):::styleMlp
                        A_LN2("LayerNorm\n64\n128 params"):::styleNorm
                        A_Act3("Tanh"):::styleNorm
                        A_Head("Logits\n64→4\n260 params"):::styleHead
                        A_Emb --> A_LN1
                        A_LN1 --> A_Act1
                        A_Act1 --> A_Concat
                        A_Concat --> A_Dense2
                        A_Dense2 --> A_Dense3
                        A_Dense3 --> A_LN2
                        A_LN2 --> A_Act3
                        A_Act3 --> A_Head
                        end
                        subgraph Critic ["Critic"]
                        direction TB
                        C_Emb("Dense\n243→58\n14,152 params"):::styleMlp
                        C_LN1("LayerNorm\n58\n116 params"):::styleNorm
                        C_Act1("Tanh"):::styleNorm
                        C_Concat("Concat\n→64"):::styleConcat
                        C_Dense2("Dense\n64→192\n12,480 params"):::styleMlp
                        C_Dense3("Dense\n192→64\n12,352 params"):::styleMlp
                        C_LN2("LayerNorm\n64\n128 params"):::styleNorm
                        C_Act3("Tanh"):::styleNorm
                        C_Head("Value\n64→1\n65 params"):::styleHead
                        C_Emb --> C_LN1
                        C_LN1 --> C_Act1
                        C_Act1 --> C_Concat
                        C_Concat --> C_Dense2
                        C_Dense2 --> C_Dense3
                        C_Dense3 --> C_LN2
                        C_LN2 --> C_Act3
                        C_Act3 --> C_Head
                        end
                        Obs --> Flat
                        Flat --> A_Emb
                        Flat --> C_Emb
                        Scalars --> A_Concat
                        Scalars --> C_Concat
                        Actor ~~~ Critic

graph TD
                        classDef styleInput fill:#fbcfe8,stroke:#f472b6,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleNorm fill:#fef9c3,stroke:#facc15,color:#0f172a
                        classDef styleMlp fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#38bdf8,color:#0f172a
